eyebrow: Est. Corner of S. Alamo & Cedar
heading:
Introducing
Bruno's Dive.
body1: Transforming the iconic corner of S. Alamo & Cedar back to its original 1960s roots — experience vintage beer lights with modern games & jukebox tunes.
body2: Well drinks, ice cold beer, bar snacks & of course an IPA on tap. Patrons 21 & over will belly up to the historic bar at Bruno's Dive.
tagline: Neighbors will delight in the comfort of Bruno's Dive Bar right in the heart of Southtown: The Arts District.
